'''âs-ch-y''' ('''kasachay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quass|quass]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quass|quass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| kasachay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisachay|thisachay]] || [[word:jisachay|jisachay]] || [[word:shisachay|shisachay]] || [[word:kisachay|kisachay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusachay|thuthusachay]] || [[word:jujusachay|jujusachay]] || [[word:shushusachay|shushusachay]] || [[word:kukusachay|kukusachay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusachay|thusachay]] || [[word:jusachay|jusachay]] || [[word:shusachay|shusachay]] || [[word:kusachay|kusachay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusachay|thusachay]] || [[word:jusachay|jusachay]] || [[word:shusachay|shusachay]] || [[word:kusachay|kusachay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesachay|thesachay]] || [[word:jesachay|jesachay]] || [[word:shesachay|shesachay]] || [[word:kesachay|kesachay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosachay|thothosachay]] || [[word:jojosachay|jojosachay]] || [[word:shoshosachay|shoshosachay]] || [[word:kokosachay|kokosachay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosachay|thosachay]] || [[word:josachay|josachay]] || [[word:shosachay|shosachay]] || [[word:kosachay|kosachay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosachay|thosachay]] || [[word:josachay|josachay]] || [[word:shosachay|shosachay]] || [[word:kosachay|kosachay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsachay|thĂŠsachay]] || [[word:jĂŠsachay|jĂŠsachay]] || [[word:shĂŠsachay|shĂŠsachay]] || [[word:kĂŠsachay|kĂŠsachay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasachay|thathasachay]] || [[word:jajasachay|jajasachay]] || [[word:shashasachay|shashasachay]] || [[word:kakasachay|kakasachay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasachay|thasachay]] || [[word:jasachay|jasachay]] || [[word:shasachay|shasachay]] || [[word:kasachay|kasachay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasachay|thasachay]] || [[word:jasachay|jasachay]] || [[word:shasachay|shasachay]] || [[word:kasachay|kasachay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasachay|shasachay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasachay|goshasachay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasachay|gokishasachay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasachaynĂŒ|shasachaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasachaynknĂŒ|goshasachaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachaynĂŒ|gokishasachaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasachayshĂ«|shasachayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasachaynkshĂ«|goshasachaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasachayshĂ«|gokishasachayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachayro|shasachayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachaynkro|goshasachaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachayro|gokishasachayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachaymu|shasachaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachaynkmu|goshasachaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachaymu|gokishasachaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasachaysher|shasachaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasachaynksher|goshasachaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasachaysher|gokishasachaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasachayng|shasachayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasachaynkng|goshasachaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasachayng|gokishasachayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasachaya|shasachaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasachaynkya|goshasachaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasachaya|gokishasachaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasachayam|shasachayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasachaynkyam|goshasachaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasachayam|gokishasachayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachaynĂŒshĂ«|shasachaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshasachaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishasachaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachaynĂŒro|shasachaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachaynknĂŒro|goshasachaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachaynĂŒro|gokishasachaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachaynĂŒmu|shasachaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachaynknĂŒmu|goshasachaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachaynĂŒmu|gokishasachaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachayshĂ«nĂŒ|shasachayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasachaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasachayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachayshĂ«ro|shasachayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachaynkshĂ«ro|goshasachaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachayshĂ«ro|gokishasachayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachayshĂ«mu|shasachayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachaynkshĂ«mu|goshasachaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachayshĂ«mu|gokishasachayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachayronĂŒ|shasachayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachaynkronĂŒ|goshasachaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachayronĂŒ|gokishasachayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachayroshĂ«|shasachayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachaynkroshĂ«|goshasachaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachayroshĂ«|gokishasachayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasachayromu|shasachayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasachaynkromu|goshasachaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasachayromu|gokishasachayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasachaymunĂŒ|shasachaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasachaynkmunĂŒ|goshasachaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasachaymunĂŒ|gokishasachaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasachaymushĂ«|shasachaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasachaynkmushĂ«|goshasachaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasachaymushĂ«|gokishasachaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasachaymuro|shasachaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasachaynkmuro|goshasachaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasachaymuro|gokishasachaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
